name: axiom-procedural-architecture
description: Structural reasoning for staged procedures — design, critique, and analyze decompositions of any procedure into composable stages with explicit dependencies, decision points, and flow properties. Two roles (producer/critic) over one shared corpus. Router + 13 sheets, 3 commands, 2 agents. Pattern pack — applies wherever you build a wizard, troubleshooting tree, training curriculum, configuration flow, decision pipeline, or workflow.
